summary: Set 030 Session 4: bulk v2->v3 migrator + in-repo migration + Lightweight ergonomics dry-run + consumer dry-run doc + RC build (NO publish). Shipped ai_router/migrate_session_state.py with inferential semantics (closed-signal force-promote-all even when completedSessions[] is missing; strict bool/float filtering at v2-field boundary; atomic write via unique tempfile + try/finally cleanup; strategies regex/generic/ai/interactive; --scan/--in-place/--strategy/--only/--verbose/--json flags). Shared migrate_one_set(path, strategy) helper for Session 5's in-extension lazy migrator. 44 pytest cases (38 original + 6 Round A regression). Ran --strategy regex --in-place against 29 in-repo v2 state files (001-029); 0 violations, 0 malformed; committed as its own separate diff. D16 Lightweight ergonomics dry-run against dabbler-homehealthcare-accessdb fixture (001-forms-detail-uat) confirmed one-field-flip per transition; demo round-trips through get_progress() cleanly. Authored docs/migration-v3-dry-run.md (~250 lines) covering inference rules, dry-run/in-place workflow, rollback, Lightweight ergonomics, set-ordering (D15). RC version bumps applied (NOT PUBLISHED): dabbler-ai-router 0.3.2->0.4.0rc1 (PEP 440), extension 0.13.17->0.14.0-rc.1 (semver); CHANGELOGs updated with explicit Session-5 publish-gate notes. RC artifacts built locally: dist/dabbler_ai_router-0.4.0rc1-py3-none-any.whl + tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.14.0-rc.1.vsix (728 KB, 20 files). D13 lint allowlist extended to include migrate_session_state.py (the migrator IS the v2-compat path). Round A verification (gpt-5-4, $0.190) flagged 3 must-fix issues: (1) closed-signal disjunct must compare currentSession to LEGACY totalSessions not the resolved total (otherwise a v2 file with status=complete + spec.md widened beyond legacy total falls into all-not-started + rule-7 violation); (2) future-schema files (schemaVersion>3) must be refused, not downgraded by treating them as v2; (3) _atomic_write_json must use unique tempfile + cleanup-on-failure, not a fixed .{basename}.tmp path. All three fixes applied with regression tests; Round B (gpt-5-4, $0.068) confirmed VERIFIED with no new must-fix issues. Tests: pytest 574 passed + 1 skipped + 8 e2e deselected; Mocha 376 passing + 2 baseline failures (both pre-existing, unrelated to v3); Layer 3 Playwright 5/5; tsc --noEmit clean.

reason.specifics: Session 5 (final) ships the in-extension lazy migration UX + 'Setting up your project...' loading state + GA release to PyPI + Marketplace. Per spec D14 the publish moves here from Session 4 (operators upgrading the extension never see broken state on v2 files without the lazy-migration UX in place). Operator-visible UX work (loading sentinel TreeItem with Dabbler icon, per-set (needs migration) badge, quickpick CTA with regex/AI/generic strategies, viewsWelcome `when` clause gating) has multiple correctness criteria; Opus 4.7 @ effort=high is appropriate given the cumulative S5 surface (UX + AI-fallback wiring + version bump + GA smoke + consumer-repo notification). The Session 4 migrator's shared migrate_one_set(path, strategy) helper is the single source of truth Session 5's in-extension migrator will subprocess into — keeping the architectural context warm pays off.
